final_answer:
FINAL_RESULT:
  UUID: 90ad2ca1-eb73-4d99-8f4f-a168f0bd03f2
  PREDICTED_SMILES: CC[Si](CC)(CC)OCCOC(C)(C)Oc1cc(S(=O)(=O)Nc2ccccc2)ccc1C(F)(F)F
  CONFIDENCE: 0.92
  REASON_BRIEF: The NMR data reveals a sulfonamide (Ph-NH-SO2-) connected to a CF3-substituted aromatic ring bearing an acetonide-protected diol side chain (gem-dimethyl at 1.16 ppm, ketal carbon at 81.0 ppm) terminated with a triethylsilyl ether (0.89 and 0.58 ppm). The aromatic substitution pattern (8 protons total, with 3 showing 1,2,4-trisubstituted coupling) and exact mass match the proposed structure.
